entity.summary: Self-custodial decentralized trading and aggregation interface routing crypto and tokenized real-world assets across issuers, chains, bridges, and on-chain and off-chain liquidity sources.
entity.notes: Current first-party application and documentation expose active swaps, tokenized-market discovery, aggregation, routing, and cross-chain execution. Current independent metrics report non-zero DEX aggregator volume, bridge volume, fees, and revenue. Confidence is medium because the interface depends on third-party issuers and liquidity sources and current routed volume is modest. No legal entity or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: SuperSwap documentation introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies SuperSwap as a self-custodial trading and aggregation layer for crypto and tokenized markets across chains, issuers, bridges, and liquidity sources.

evidence.title: SuperSwap Ink DEX aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics classify SuperSwap as a DEX aggregator and report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative routed swap volume together with fees and revenue.
